rebootDescription: Are you sure you want to reboot the system? This action cannot be undone.
restartCommandSent: Restart command sent. Waiting for the service to come back online.
restartConnectionInterrupted: The connection was interrupted while restarting. Checking whether the service is recovering.
restartPendingRecovery: The restart command was sent, but the service has not responded yet. Please refresh this page in a moment.
restartRecovered: The service is reachable again. Version information has been refreshed.
updateServerDescription: Are you sure you want to update the server version from {{current}} to {{latest}}?
updateWebDescription: Are you sure you want to update the web version from {{current}} to {{latest}}?
